channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump Cabinet picks give some of his Muslim voters pause
item.description: Muslims for Trump co-founder Rabiul Chowdhury said some of the nominations are concerning for voters.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Almost 100 House Democrats push for Gaetz Ethics report’s release
item.description: Nearly 100 House Democrats wrote to the House Ethics Committee, urging them to publish its report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) and their investigation into his alleged misconduct after President-elect Trump nominated him to serve as attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump gives one-word response when asked if he is reconsidering Matt Gaetz's AG nomination
item.description: President-elect Trump on Tuesday said he would not be reconsidering his nomination of former Congressman Matt Gaetz for attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosecutors oppose tossing Trump’s hush money conviction but are open to sentencing delay
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York prosecutors oppose any effort to dismiss President-elect Donald Trump’s hush money conviction, but they expressed openness Tuesday to delaying sentencing until after his second term.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump Cabinet picks increase odds Edward Snowden could see life of freedom in the US
item.description: If Trump has his way, Tulsi Gabbard will be at the helm of U.S. intelligence and Matt Gaetz will be leading the DOJ, giving whistle-blower Edward Snowden his best chances yet at freedom in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump to nominate Mehmet Oz for CMS administrator
item.description: President-elect Trump said Tuesday he is nominating television personality Dr. Mehmet Oz to serve as the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) administrator. Oz unsuccessfully ran for Senate in Pennsylvania in 2022 with Trump's endorsement and has been a Trump ally ever since.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Trump appoints Dr. Oz to key HHS position in new administration
item.description: President-elect Trump announced on Tuesday that Dr. Mehmet Oz will be his nominee for Administrator to the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vance will introduce Gaetz, Hegseth to senators this week
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance will make the rounds with GOP senators later this week to introduce them to former-Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) and Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump’s picks to head the Justice and Defense departments.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Bragg case 'effectively over' in 'major victory,' Trump officials say
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Trump officials told Fox News Digital that Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg’s case is “effectively over," after he requested a stay until 2029, marking a “major victory" for President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rick Scott outlines consensus for 'dramatic change' to Senate operation in post-McConnell era
item.description: Sen. Rick Scott detailed a number of areas in which Republicans overwhelmingly want change ahead of the new Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DOGE taking initial steps, building internal staff: source
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk and biotech entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy have a good working relationship, a source said.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Manhattan DA opposes Trump’s bid to dismiss hush money conviction
item.description: Manhattan prosecutors on Tuesday said they will oppose President-elect Trump’s demand to dismiss his New York criminal conviction following the election, instead floating the idea the judge could freeze the case until Trump leaves office.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Jr.'s support of raw milk sheds light on debate
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's pick for Health and Human Services Secretary, Robert F Kennedy, Jr, has long been a proponent of natural food choices.
item.dc:creator: Mills Hayes, NewsNation

item.title: Speaker Johnson becomes 'MAGA' Mike, cementing place in Trump's circle
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is cementing his place in President-elect Trump’s inner orbit, becoming not only a visible — if slightly out-of-place-looking — part of his entourage, but a key supporter of his no-holds-barred approach to his second term.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9

item.title: Trump could 'revoke' China's free trade designation: Moolenaar
item.description: Moolenaar said tightening China's trade capabilities is "in line" with the president-elect's thinking.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: 2 women tell Ethics panel Matt Gaetz paid them for sex, attorney says
item.description: Leppard said the House Ethics Committee and his clients went one by one through a series of Venmo transactions.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Rep. Nancy Mace introduces Capitol bathroom bill restrictions
item.description: Mace is currently working with House leadership to include the bathroom restrictions into a rules package.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: Biden asks Congress for about $100 billion in disaster relief funding
item.description: The largest chunk of funding — about $40 billion — would be for FEMA's disaster relief fund, so that it has enough money to last through the coming year. But there are requests for 16 agencies.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's emerging Cabinet
item.description: President-elect Trump has made quick work of pulling together a Cabinet and group of senior aides for his incoming administration, roiling Washington with some of his more controversial picks in the process.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Appeals court allows Indiana gender-affirming care ban to remain in effect
item.description: Indiana’s Republican Gov. Eric Holcomb signed the law, Senate Bill 480, last spring, one day after he called the measure “clear as mud.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: Trump’s criminal defense attorneys offered DOJ roles
item.description: President-elect Trump announced Thursday he will nominate three of his personal criminal defense attorneys to serve in senior Justice Department roles. Todd Blanche will serve as deputy attorney general, and Emil Bove will serve as principal associate deputy attorney general, the department's No.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Gaetz once faced sex trafficking investigation by Justice Dept. he could now lead
item.description: Inside a private meeting of House Republicans, the news that Trump had chosen Gaetz to lead the Justice Department sent a shock.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Many Californians would back Kamala Harris for California governor, new poll suggests
item.description: It’s unclear what Vice President Kamala Harris will do after losing the presidential election, but should she run for California governor, support among state residents is seemingly strong, new polling suggests.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Trump picks Marco Rubio as his Secretary of State
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump named Sen. Marco Rubio of Florida as his nominee for secretary of state on Wednesday, setting up a onetime critic who evolved into one of the president-elect’s fiercest defenders to become the nation’s top diplomat.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and JILL COLVIN Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
